description:
Perform a RECIST tumor measurement on the loaded CT scan in Weasis. Measure the long axis and the perpendicular short axis of a distinct anatomical structure. Save a screenshot of the viewer showing both intersecting measurement lines to ~/DICOM/exports/recist_annotation.png. Record the measured values (numeric value and unit) in ~/DICOM/exports/recist_report.txt using the following format:

Long Axis: <value>
Short Axis: <value>
